description_long: This is a single-story bungalow surrounded by a neatly trimmed hedge, featuring a spacious green lawn and a rectangular swimming pool in the backyard. The house has a dark gray gable roof with a small dormer window, and a covered front porch supported by white columns. The facade includes a single-car garage, a driveway with a parked black car, and a white picket gate at the entrance. Large windows are symmetrically arranged on the front and rear, allowing ample natural light inside. The backyard is open and features a patio area adjacent to the pool, ideal for outdoor activities. A mature tree is planted near the front, adding to the suburban charm.
description: A single-story, dark gray gable-roofed bungalow with a front porch, garage, large lawn, and backyard pool, all enclosed by a hedge.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, covered porch, garage, driveway with car, and a tree near the gate.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, driveway, and the full length of the house with the pool visible in the backyard.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard patio, large windows, and the swimming pool set in the lawn.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the house's side elevation, backyard, and the tree near the rear corner.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with grouped rear windows
